title: Nova OS AG-UI streaming events
description: Typed shape of the AG-UI streaming events Nova OS emits over Server-Sent Events on chat surfaces (the `X-Protocol: ag-ui` gated stream). This is a SEPARATE contract from the OpenAPI partner spec's `StreamEvent` union (the #99-native snake_case dialect): AG-UI is the adopted streaming standard (nova-os #370) whose wire fields are camelCase and whose `type` discriminator values are the canonical `@ag-ui/core` SCREAMING_SNAKE set. Hand-maintained to mirror nova-os `internal/server/streaming/agui/events.go`; the OpenAPI codegen does NOT produce these (it emits no SSE runtime). Each event is one `data: {json}\n\n` SSE frame; `type` discriminates.

RunStarted.description: Lifecycle — the agent run has begun. First frame of a stream.

RunFinished.description: Lifecycle — terminal success frame. `result` is optional (`@ag-ui/core` RunFinishedEventSchema). Prior to nova-os #429 this emitted `outcome` and omitted threadId/runId — clients MUST use the current shape.

RunError.description: Lifecycle — terminal error frame. Emitted instead of RUN_FINISHED on failure.

TextMessageStart.description: Text streaming — opens an assistant text message. `role` is typically "assistant".

TextMessageContent.description: Text streaming — one incremental token/chunk of the open text message.

TextMessageEnd.description: Text streaming — closes the open text message.

ReasoningMessageStart.description: Reasoning/thinking stream — opens a reasoning message (was THINKING_* before the early-2026 AG-UI rename). Gated on stream_thinking; don't render as the answer.

ReasoningMessageContent.description: Reasoning/thinking stream — one incremental chunk of reasoning.

ReasoningMessageEnd.description: Reasoning/thinking stream — closes the reasoning message.

ToolCallStart.description: Tool call — the agent is invoking a tool. Precedes its TOOL_CALL_RESULT.

ToolCallArgs.description: Tool call — one chunk of the serialized-JSON tool arguments, accumulated by toolCallId.

delta.description: Serialized JSON chunk; concatenate over toolCallId to reconstruct the args object.

ToolCallEnd.description: Tool call — argument streaming for this call is complete.

ToolCallResult.description: Tool call — the result of a completed tool call. `messageId` ties it back to the assistant message that requested the call; `role` is typically "tool".

StateDelta.description: State — an RFC 6902 JSON Patch describing incremental changes to the agent's shared state (e.g. persist_fields). The wire field is `delta` (canonical @ag-ui/core); prior to nova-os #425 it was `patch` — clients MUST read `delta`.

delta.description: RFC 6902 JSON Patch — array of operation objects.

StateSnapshot.description: State — full state snapshot (alternative to STATE_DELTA). Likely emitted on connect by future async-job AG-UI streams.

CustomEvent.description: Escape hatch for Nova-OS-specific extensions without a standard AG-UI event type. `name` is a `nova.<x>` namespaced inner event (e.g. "nova.route_hint", "nova.citations", "nova.phase", "nova.done_meta"); `value` is the partner-defined payload. Uses the canonical discriminator "CUSTOM" (NOT "CUSTOM_EVENT" — strict-zod consumers reject the latter; nova-os #416).

RawEvent.description: AG-UI passthrough for protocol-aware proxies that forward verbatim. Canonical discriminator "RAW" (NOT "RAW_EVENT"; nova-os #416).
